heading: Notice of fiduciary relationship
label: 6903 Notice of fiduciary relationship
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Rights and obligations of fiduciary
children.label: a Rights and obligations of fiduciary
children.text: Upon notice to the Secretary that any person is acting for another person in a fiduciary capacity, such fiduciary shall assume the powers, rights, duties, and privileges of such other person in respect of a tax imposed by this title (except as otherwise specifically provided and except that the tax shall be collected from the estate of such other person), until notice is given that the fiduciary capacity has terminated.

children.heading: Manner of notice
children.label: b Manner of notice
children.text: Notice under this section shall be given in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary.
